title: Cute Mob Models: Sound Pack
description: The Sound Pack for CMMRP to give the mobs voices to make them more immersive!
body:
![LOGO](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tomanex/Image-dumping/refs/heads/main/mods/cmm/cmm_logo2.png)

## Support The Team
**Discord:** https://discord.com/invite/3qmMVa97eM

# Overview
**Requires [Cute Mob Models RP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cute-mob-models-resource-pack) to apply this Sound Pack.**

The Sound Pack for Cute Mob Models mod to make the mobs feel a bit more immersive! No longer does the Ender Girl sound very spooky, or the Wolf Girl sounding like a real wolf!

This packs works on 1.12.2 to 1.20+

## Mobs Included:
* Villager
* Zombie
* Zombie Villager
* Zombified Piglin
* Silverfish
* Wolf
* Snow Golem
* Iron Golem
* blaze
